metadata.title: Turning a Tight Mid Fight Into a Smooth Double Kill With Smart Angles in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how clever positioning and sharp aim change the game in this intense mid clash. Ever pulled off a clutch like this? Share your stories below!

Got a clutch moment like this? Let me know in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutchplays #fps
